qs: 1. When sodium atom forms the ion Na<sup>+</sup>.

qs: 2. Which of the following statements about rare gases are correct? I. Their outermost shells are fully filled II. They are generally unreactive III. Their outermost shells are partially filled IV. They have lone pair of electrons in their outermost shell

opts.q2: C. I, II and III only
opts.q3: D. I, II, III and IV
